basic_info.headline: Member of Technical Staff @ Anthropic
basic_info.about: Currently working on large model inference. Previously, built and managed Marketplace Investments Team at Uber, which develops 1) innovative ML estimators and optimization techniques; and 2) large scale data, compute and ML infrastructure, to optimize multi-billion dollar incentives & pricing spend across multiple Uber’s business verticals. Prior to Uber, helped build and scale the growth efforts at Dropbox.

experience.title: Member of Technical Staff
experience.description: Model Inference -- EM supporting part of model inference

experience.title: Engineering Manager
experience.description:
Built and managed Marketplace Investments Team at Uber, which develops 1) innovative ML estimators and optimization techniques; and 2) large scale data, compute and ML infrastructure, to optimize multi-billion dollar incentives & pricing spend across multiple Uber’s business verticals. Supported teams of 15+ members across MLEs, product engineers and Applied Scientists. 

Previously built and scaled multiple key products in the domain of Pricing. These efforts led to step-changes in how Uber optimizes pricing and incentives. 

Tech Buzzword:
Microservice, Thrift, Redis, Kafka, Cadence, NoSQL, ELK, Hive, Presto, Airflow, Batch/Online Learning & Serving, Feature Engineering, Model Tuning, Constrained Optimization, Spark

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.description:
Founding engineer and TL of the team which owns comms and promotion content CMS, user targeting, event scheduling, user acquisition automation & optimization, and internationalization. These tooling combined drove significant incremental sales for the company. Drove key efforts to optimize feedback loop of marketing content curation and experimentation, smart user segmentation, and user engagement analytics. Domain expert and tech consultant on i18n adoption across all products and programs within Dropbox. Wore multiple hats to ensure the success of the team through hyper-growth.

Previously worked on a variety of things in product platform team.

Tech stack:
GoLang, Python 2, ReactJS, Protobuf, Nginx, HAProxy, Hive, Presto, Kafka, RabbitMQ, MemCache, MySQL, Smartling(i18n)

experience.title: Teaching Assistant - CS241 System Programming
experience.description: Held lab hours, led discussion sessions, wrote MP(Machine Problems) spec and auto graders, and assisted students grow

experience.title: Software Development Engineer Intern
experience.description:
MapReduce Runtime - built below 2 tools from scratch

1. MapReduce local runner. A tool that allows user to run MapReduce locally but with a portion of real data. Vastly reduced MapReduce development and debug time.
2. MapReduce generic Log Retriever. A tool that collects run time logs in distributed machines and analyze and exposes them in an user interface.
